subject: fix(pwa): fix Strict Mode interval death, document Brave iOS uncertainty
body:
usePWAUpdate: useRegisterSW uses useState lazy initializer internally —
onRegistered fires exactly once, not on Strict Mode re-mount. The hourly
interval was created inside onRegistered, so after Strict Mode cleanup
killed it, it was never recreated. Fix: restore registered state flag
that triggers a separate interval effect with [registered] dependency.
Removed intervalRef (no longer needed — effect owns its own cleanup).

usePWAInstall: Add comment documenting that 'brave' in navigator is
unverified on iOS Brave (WebKit engine). If absent, iOS Brave falls
through to 'safari' detection — benign since iOS Brave can't install
PWAs anyway. Proper verification requires physical iOS Brave testing.

Tags: pwa, hooks, strict-mode, browser-detection
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-reliability
Semver: patch
